text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober doesn't show up for training, so I go
looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Essential oils are great, but there's nothing quite
as relaxing as the scents of real nature...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! Uh... Wh-what does it matter what I'm
doing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey. I'm just taking a little break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've rested enough, so I should head back soo—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've rested enough, so I should head back soo—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait... Is it time for training?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I got too relaxed... Sorry about that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, we don't have enough time to train.
